events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a field-service visit for loop checks & wiring in Instrumentation & Controls. The observed field condition is "missing surge protection on field side." The work is through its testing/inspection step. Reference materials include loop drawings and ISA 5.1.

Missing surge protection on the field side is a non-compliance issue - if the loop drawings specify surge protection, then this is a defect. Surge protection is critical for protecting instrumentation from transients. This is a safety/reliability concern.

Decision: fail (non-compliant condition)
Risk: high (missing surge protection can lead to equipment damage, false readings, safety issues)
Work stage: tested/inspected
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 80-90% since testing was done but defect found
Confidence: high, maybe 0.85
Findings: missing surge protection on field side
Actions: install surge protection device as specified in loop drawings
References: loop drawings, ISA 5.1

    "Missing surge protection on field side of loop; does not match loop drawing requirements",
    "Field-side instrumentation vulnerable to transient overvoltage damage"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install specified surge protective device on field side per loop drawing",
    "Re-perform loop check after surge protection installed and verify continuity and isolation",
    "Document deviation and re-inspect before returning loop to service"
  ],
  "rationale": "The loop drawing specifies field-side surge protection, which is absent. This is a non-compliant installation that leaves the loop vulnerable to transients; since the work has already passed through inspection with the defect present, it must fail and be reworked.",

}
